MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Kim Alexander, Esq., KEESAL, YOUNG & LOGAN, Four Embarcadero Center, Suite 1500, San Francisco, CA 94111, 415-981-7729, on behalf of petitioners and moving parties Robert Appleby, et al. Defendant did not appear.

After counsel made a statement, the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PETITIONER ROBERT APPLEBY, MAYNARD LICHTERMAN Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Per Ccp 1285 Et.Seq.: GRANT No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Honorable Paul H. Alvarado Reported by Robert Balian, CSR #5220. (gps) (302/JU)
